## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling
- [ ] Schema or registry
- [ ] Skill proposal
- [ ] Skill implementation
- [ ] Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pwsh scripts/validate-repository.ps1`.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] I avoided bulk-generated skills.
- [ ] I included examples and validation for any future skill changes.
- [ ] I checked for duplicate or overlapping skill scope.

## Reviewer Notes

List domain, safety, compatibility, or migration concerns reviewers should inspect.
